session.assistant:
The command exited with code 2, which indicates a make error. Let me check the complete output to identify the specific issue.
Looking at the output, I can see that the failure is related to Prettier formatting:
**make failed: Prettier formatting issues**
The output shows: ``` Code style issues found in 2 files. Run Prettier with --write to fix. ```
The two files with Prettier formatting issues are: 1. `docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md` 2. `docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md`
All other checks passed successfully: - Linting: passed - Type checking (ty): passed - Unit Tests (erk): 6011 passed - Tests (erk-dev): 136 passed - Tests (erk-statusline): 115 passed - Tests (erk-mcp): 28 passed
The only issue preventing `make fast-ci` from completing is the Prettier formatting in those two markdown files.
